name: oh-my-codex
description: Pennix OMX plugin surfaces for OpenAI Codex CLI

interface.shortDescription: Pennix OMX workflow layer and skill bundle for OpenAI Codex CLI.
interface.longDescription: Plugin = Pennix OMX skill/workflow discovery plus plugin-cache hook metadata, MCP servers, and apps. Setup = runtime wiring; legacy setup installs native agents/prompts, while plugin setup keeps Codex hooks/goals enabled, removes setup-managed hooks.json wrappers from the user Codex home, archives stale legacy native agents/prompts, and keeps config, optional AGENTS.md, HUD, and runtime state current.
